nx_centreon_influxdb_query_query: usage_total,SELECT $nx_centreon_influxdb_query_query_aggregation$(usage_total) AS usage_total FROM (SELECT 100 - usage_idle AS "usage_total" FROM "$nx_centreon_influxdb_query_database$"."$nx_centreon_influxdb_query_retention_policy$"."cpu" WHERE host=~/^$nx_centreon_influxdb_query_host_name$$$/ AND cpu = 'cpu-total' AND time > (now() - $nx_centreon_influxdb_query_time_window$) GROUP BY "$nx_centreon_influxdb_query_instance$") GROUP BY "$nx_centreon_influxdb_query_instance$";

usage_user,SELECT $nx_centreon_influxdb_query_query_aggregation$(usage_user) AS usage_user FROM "$nx_centreon_influxdb_query_database$"."$nx_centreon_influxdb_query_retention_policy$"."cpu" WHERE host=~/^$nx_centreon_influxdb_query_host_name$$$/ AND cpu = 'cpu-total' AND time > (now() - $nx_centreon_influxdb_query_time_window$) GROUP BY "$nx_centreon_influxdb_query_instance$";

usage_system,SELECT $nx_centreon_influxdb_query_query_aggregation$(usage_system) AS usage_system FROM "$nx_centreon_influxdb_query_database$"."$nx_centreon_influxdb_query_retention_policy$"."cpu" WHERE host=~/^$nx_centreon_influxdb_query_host_name$$$/ AND cpu = 'cpu-total' AND time > (now() - $nx_centreon_influxdb_query_time_window$) GROUP BY "$nx_centreon_influxdb_query_instance$";
nx_centreon_plugin_change_short_output: UNKNOWN: No queries found.~UNKNOWN: No data in the last $nx_centreon_influxdb_query_time_window$~gi

vars.nx_centreon_influxdb_query_multiple_outp: Free space on all disks is OK
nx_centreon_influxdb_query_query: bytes_free_percent,SELECT $nx_centreon_influxdb_query_query_aggregation$(bytes_free_percent) AS bytes_free_percent FROM (SELECT (100 - used_percent) AS bytes_free_percent FROM "$nx_centreon_influxdb_query_database$"."$nx_centreon_influxdb_query_retention_policy$"."disk" WHERE host=~/^$nx_centreon_influxdb_query_host_name$$$/ AND (device=~/$nx_centreon_influxdb_query_disk_linux_filter_path$/ OR fstype=~/$nx_centreon_influxdb_query_disk_linux_filter_fstype$/ or path=~/$nx_centreon_influxdb_query_disk_linux_filter_device$/) AND time > (now() - $nx_centreon_influxdb_query_time_window$)) GROUP BY "$nx_centreon_influxdb_query_instance$";

inodes_free_percent,SELECT $nx_centreon_influxdb_query_query_aggregation$(inodes_free_percent) AS inodes_free_percent FROM (SELECT (100 * inodes_free / inodes_total) AS inodes_free_percent FROM "$nx_centreon_influxdb_query_database$"."$nx_centreon_influxdb_query_retention_policy$"."disk" WHERE host=~/^$nx_centreon_influxdb_query_host_name$$$/ AND (device=~/$nx_centreon_influxdb_query_disk_linux_filter_path$/ OR fstype=~/$nx_centreon_influxdb_query_disk_linux_filter_fstype$/ or path=~/$nx_centreon_influxdb_query_disk_linux_filter_device$/) AND time > (now() - $nx_centreon_influxdb_query_time_window$)) GROUP BY "$nx_centreon_influxdb_query_instance$";
nx_centreon_plugin_change_short_output: UNKNOWN: No queries found.~UNKNOWN: No data in the last $nx_centreon_influxdb_query_time_window$~gi

2858.caption: [NX] Instance label
2858.description: Set the instance label on which the results should be calculate for (Example: --instance='name').  The instance label must be the same label as the "GROUP BY" keyword.

2861.caption: [NX] IQL Query
2861.description: Set a InfluxQL query. Query option must be like --query='label,query'. Query must contain an "AS" keyword to rename the column of the selected data, and must match the label.
